title: Tragacantha schistocalyx
taxonomy: Tragacantha schistocalyx is classified as a species within the plant family Fabaceae. This classification places it within the order Fabales and the clade Rosid. It is further classified as a member of the tribe Astragaleae and the subfamily Faboideae. Tragacantha schistocalyx is a type of shrub or perennial plant that is native to certain regions. The classification of this species is based on its characteristics and relationships to other plant species.

Tragacantha schistocalyx is also believed to possess antimicrobial properties, which may help in preventing the growth of certain bacteria and fungi.
